package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for update_single_row_in_loop_without_batch: GORM Update(...), UpdateColumn(...), or Updates(...) calls observed inside loops one row at a time.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule302NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario302Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule302NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
